name: Java Tomcat Web App
onCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y tomcat10 tomcat10-admin && sudo sed -i 's/</tomcat-users>/  <role rolename="manager-gui"/> <user username="admin" password="admin" roles="manager-gui"/></tomcat-users>/' /etc/tomcat10/tomcat-users.xml
postStartCommand: cd WebApp_SK && mvn clean package -q && sudo cp target/*.war /var/lib/tomcat10/webapps/ && sudo systemctl start tomcat10 && echo '✅ Tomcat started — open port 8080 to view the app'
